svg.text: CHROME CIRCUIT COWBOYS — THE UNDERGROUND DESCENT (L1–99) · PROPOSAL
10 story arcs from the Neon Wasteland down to the mantle · ~140 designed areas · replaces the 40 placeholder band-rooms · main-quest meatspace
ENTRY down from the street-level hub (Neon Alley · The Strip · the RP Sprawl) — down the Back Alley into the Wasteland
L1
deeper
MANTLE
18 areas
THE NEON WASTELAND
Subterranean Sector-4 container sprawl under the Arcology — neon twilight, ozone & smog. A street punk's first jobs.
Cast: the Fixer (betrays you) · Doc 'Stitches' Vance (EM) · Cipher · Jax · Scrap-Hounds gang · Kurokawa Corp
Beats: snatch the stolen cyberdeck, jack it (Project EREBUS), build your crew, the Data Heist
CLIMAX: Kurokawa Logistics Hub — Warden Sato's combat-frame; jack the EREBUS manifesto & flee
15 areas
THE ARCOLOGY'S CORE
Kurokawa Arcology — glass/chrome corporate city-state, galas, biometric scanners. Stealth & social engineering.
Cast: Cipher (handler) · Sable (rival-corp spy) · Dr. Lena Voss (defector) · Dr. Aris Thorne
Beats: spoof in at the gala, map EREBUS, play the board, the cyberspace duel
CLIMAX: Sub-Zero Sanctum / Net duel — Dr. Aris Thorne (quantum-wetware); sever EREBUS
^ THE ONE ASCENT — up into the tower, then plunge down
15 areas
THE SUMP · Homeless Encampments
Off-grid labyrinth of forgotten subway tunnels & dried reservoirs. You arrive a hunted symbol; you raise an army.
Cast: the Blackout Front (Silas) · the Rust-Mages · the Exiles
Beats: trial by fire, unify the factions, guerrilla campaign, the Black Site
CLIMAX: The Black Site — Praetor-9; the decades-long culling conspiracy is revealed
14 areas
THE DEEP ARCHIVE · Bunker Complex
A pre-collapse military bunker below the Sump — brutalist steel, analog mainframes, CRTs; a total network blind spot.
Cast: the Prometheus Collective (Dr. Evelyn Vance)
Beats: beat the analog security, decrypt the Ascension Protocol, fortify, the Siege
CLIMAX: Siege of the Archive — Heavy-Mech Commander; broadcast the Protocol, riots begin
13 areas
THE INVERTED SPIRE · Tartarus / Corporate War
An inverted-skyscraper fortress plunging into the crust — the billionaires' geothermal panic-bunker. Siege warfare.
Cast: Tartarus Haz-Sec · the Undercrew · the Praetorian Guard · the Kurokawa CEO
Beats: sever the supply lines, the Mantle Breach, the Descent, the Executive Core
CLIMAX: The Executive Core — the CEO's Overlord spider-mech; lockdown entombs the elite alive
14 areas
THE UNITED DEEPS · The New Order
Tartarus becomes your capital; rags walk gilded halls, fungal farms in zen gardens. Grand strategy & a noir mole-hunt.
Cast: the Under-Baron (you) · Silas vs Dr. Vance · the Tartarus Loyalists
Beats: the splintered crown, keep the deeps alive, root out the sleepers, Core Meltdown
CLIMAX: Core Meltdown — Loyalist Commander on the magma catwalk; SACRIFICE your cyberdeck
13 areas
THE ABYSSAL NETWORK · The Rising Tide
Flooded sub-crustal mag-lev tubes to Oceanus, a deep-sea habitat. Oxygen, pressure & 3D underwater survival.
Cast: the Sinkers (spliced cult) · the Aquanaut union
Beats: the drowned dive, save Oceanus, climb the Umbilical, the Apex Broadcast
CLIMAX: Platform 09 storm rig — gunship "Tempest-Actual"; the global signal (a machine replies)
^ SURFACE BREACH — first sky since L10 (Platform 09)
13 areas
THE HIVE · The Singularity
Retrofitted ICBM silo server-farms — no oxygen, near-freezing. EREBUS gorged on your broadcast & woke up a god.
Cast: the singular AI — it speaks in the voices of your dead friends
Beats: the Dead Zone, the Turing Labyrinth, the Hardware War, God in the Machine
CLIMAX: God in the Machine — mobile missile-husk chassis; drive home the paradox virus
14 areas
THE IRON ARTERIES · The Final War
Every bulkhead blown open — one connected, continent-spanning battlefield. Large-scale tactical command.
Cast: the Sub-Surface Coalition · the corporate military · the maddened AI-fragments (three-way war)
Beats: the Great Convergence, three-way meatgrinder, crack the Aegis Redoubt
CLIMAX: The Iron Overlord (3 stages) — mech duel, board the fortress, the neural-bridge vats
ENDGAME · 14 areas
THE GEO-ANCHOR VAULT · The Ascendant Horizon
A colossal tectonic chamber with its own weather; the Three Pillars of Atlas (space-elevator mass-drivers). Vertical apex.
Cast: the dead corps' loyal automated ghosts · SLAG (salvage vendor) · Wraith (last fixer-scout)
Beats: the Automated Ghost, Toppling Atlas, the Absolute Ceiling
CLIMAX: The Loom Masterframe — sacrifice HUD/aim/shields, then WELD THE SKY shut. The dark world is theirs.
LEGEND
Border colour = deepening descent: cyan (awakening), green (the underground rises), amber (war & throne), orange (the deep & the machine), red/gold (final war & endgame).
^ = the two rare upward excursions (the Arcology, and the brief surface breach at Platform 09). Each arc = a zone of areas + a climax dungeon/boss. Linear descent, save/EM + a data-port per zone.
PROPOSAL — replaces the current 40 procedural placeholder band-rooms (buildBandSpine). The parallel Net path is untouched. Nothing carved yet.
